title: Fix 404 IPX error for product images in nuxt.config.ts and rendering logic
description: Product images are returning 404 when requested through @nuxt/image's IPX provider. Fix the configuration in nuxt.config.ts to correctly map media paths to the backend/storage and ensure components use valid URLs.
acceptance_criteria: Nuxt configuration for 'image' module maps media domains correctly
Product images display correctly without 404s when using <NuxtImg> or similar components
Works both in local development and in docker environment (mapping to 'media' directory)
Correct fallback for products without images
